summary: Full e2e testing of TRC Compliance app - Golden Goose funnel. All backend APIs pass (18/18). All frontend flows working. Minor: ComplianceGauge NaN warning when no USDOT records linked.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: NaN for strokeDashoffset when user has no USDOT records linked (days_until_due is null). Gauge shows 'OVERDUE' state incorrectly instead of empty/no-data state.

issues: TRC logo appears small/blurry on login page compared to homepage logo

action_items: Fix ComplianceGauge to handle null/undefined days_until_due gracefully (don't show NaN strokeDashoffset, show no-data state instead of OVERDUE)
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceGauge receives null days_until_due from dashboard when no dot_records exist, causing NaN in SVG calculation - needs null check before computing strokeDashoffset
JWT SECRET_KEY falls back to hardcoded 'trc-fallback-secret' if JWT_SECRET_KEY env var missing - should raise error in production
Stripe webhook doesn't verify Stripe signature (sig header passed but not validated) - security concern

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass, 1 minor UI bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All main flows tested and working: Homepage USDOT lookup, Status page with YELLOW compliance, pricing cards $299/$499, monitoring signup (/monitoring?usdot=3843083), login/register, dashboard. Stripe checkout session creation tested and returns valid stripe.com URL. Test user test@trc-test.com exists in DB.
flows_verified: Home page loads with TRC logo, tagline, USDOT input, CHECK COMPLIANCE STATUS button - PASS
USDOT 3843083 returns JJ TRANSPORT ENTERPRISE LLC with YELLOW status - PASS
Status page shows YELLOW overlay, company data, RENEW NOW / ACTIVATE FREE MONITORING - PASS
Pricing cards $299 Standard and $499 Premium visible - PASS
SELECT pricing card shows email input + COMPLETE PAYMENT button - PASS
POST /api/payments/create-checkout creates Stripe session with checkout_url - PASS
POST /api/monitoring/subscribe creates account, returns JWT, redirects to dashboard - PASS
Dashboard loads after login with compliance gauge, stats grid, quick actions - PASS
Login page has SIGN IN and CREATE ACCOUNT tabs - PASS
